name: [TEMPLATE] [backlinks_plugin] Backlinks — DataForSEO Backlinks → referring domains + link gaps → prioritize → notify

nodes.name: Spend Read
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Backlink Summary

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ target: $json.__domain, internal_list_limit: 10, backlinks_status_type: "live", include_subdomains: true }]) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Referring Domains
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Link Gap

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify([Object.assign({ targets: ($json.__competitors || []).reduce((acc, comp, idx) => { acc[String(idx + 1)] = comp; return acc; }, {}), exclude_targets: [$json.__domain], limit: 200, backlinks_status_type: "live", order_by: ['rank,desc'] })]) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Write Findings

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.__rows || []).map((r) => ({ tenant: $json.__tenant, domain: $json.__domain, run_date: $json.__run_date, finding_id: r.finding_id, finding_class: r.finding_class, referring_domain: r.referring_domain, competitor: r.competitor, domain_authority: r.domain_authority, anchor: r.anchor, priority_score: r.priority_score, recommendation: r.recommendation, status: "open", evidence: r.evidence }))) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]
